character.name: "Pixel art character sprite, front
character.prompt: "Pixel art character sprite, front view, super deformed (chibi) proportions. Character anatomy: massive oversized head resting directly on a small, compact, stout, portly torso, completely lacking a neck. The character wears a red and white varsity-style bomber jacket (student style), with white sleeves and a red body. Underneath, simple blue denim jeans. On the head, a blue baseball cap worn forward, messy light brown hair peeking from underneath the cap, black gaming headphones resting around the neck. Features: 1:1.5 head-to-body ratio, short limbs attached directly to the base of the torso, squashed and cute aesthetic. Design style: clean pixel art, bold outlines, flat shading, retro 16-bit game aesthetic, sharp pixels, high quality, professional sprite design."
